Fields.Name: Hit 0: Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of sphere/capsule hitbox.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of sphere/capsule hitbox.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of sphere/capsule hitbox.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of sphere/capsule hitbox.

Fields.Name: Knockback Distance
Fields.Description: Knockback distance of attack.

Fields.Name: Hit Stop Time
Fields.Description: Duration of the 'hit' flag on the target.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect [0]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target on hit

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect [1]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target on hit.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect [2]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target on hit.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect [3]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target on hit.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect [4]
Fields.Description: Special effect applied to target on hit.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Dummy Poly [1]
Fields.Description:
Model point at origin of hitbox if the Hitbox End Model Point is not -1.
The hitbox will be a capsule with hemispherical caps positioned at these origins (with a joining cylinder).

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Dummy Poly [1]
Fields.Description:
Model point at origin of hitbox if the Hitbox End Model Point is not -1.
The hitbox will be a capsule with hemispherical caps positioned at these origins (with a joining cylinder).

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Dummy Poly [1]
Fields.Description:
Model point at origin of hitbox if the Hitbox End Model Point is not -1.
The hitbox will be a capsule with hemispherical caps positioned at these origins (with a joining cylinder).

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Dummy Poly [1]
Fields.Description:
Model point at origin of hitbox if the Hitbox End Model Point is not -1.
The hitbox will be a capsule with hemispherical caps positioned at these origins (with a joining cylinder).

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Dummy Poly [2]
Fields.Description: Model point at end of capsule hitbox. If this is -1, the hitbox will be a sphere placed at Hitbox Start Model Point.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Dummy Poly [2]
Fields.Description: Model point at end of capsule hitbox. If this is -1, the hitbox will be a sphere placed at Hitbox Start Model Point.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Dummy Poly [2]
Fields.Description: Model point at end of capsule hitbox. If this is -1, the hitbox will be a sphere placed at Hitbox Start Model Point.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Dummy Poly [2]
Fields.Description: Model point at end of capsule hitbox. If this is -1, the hitbox will be a sphere placed at Hitbox Start Model Point.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Blowing
Fields.Description: Correction value when blowing off

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Physical
Fields.Description: Multiplier (as percentage from 0 upwards) applied to character attack power to calculate physical attack damage.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Magic
Fields.Description: Multiplier (as percentage from 0 upwards) applied to character attack power to calculate magic attack damage.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Fire
Fields.Description: Multiplier (as percentage from 0 upwards) applied to character attack power to calculate fire attack damage.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Lightning
Fields.Description: Multiplier (as percentage from 0 upwards) applied to character attack power to calculate lightning attack damage.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Stamina
Fields.Description: Multiplier (as percentage from 0 upwards) applied to character attack power to calculate stamina attack damage.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Flick Attack
Fields.Description: Multiplier (as percentage from 0 upwards) applied to character flick attack power.

Fields.Name: Guard Correction: Guard Flick
Fields.Description:
Multiplier (as percentage from 0 upwards) applied to guard flick power.
PC only.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Throw Escape
Fields.Description: Multiplier (as percentage from 0 upwards) applied to weapon attacks during throws.

Fields.Name: Attack Correction: Poise
Fields.Description: Multiplier (as percentage from 0 upwards) applied to damage to target poise.

Fields.Name: Damage: Physical
Fields.Description: Absolute physical attack power of attack.

Fields.Name: Damage: Magic
Fields.Description: Absolute magic attack power of attack.

Fields.Name: Damage: Fire
Fields.Description: Absolute fire attack power of attack.

Fields.Name: Damage: Lightning
Fields.Description: Absolute lightning attack power of attack.

Fields.Name: Damage: Stamina
Fields.Description: Absolute stamina attack power of attack.

Fields.Name: Damage: Flick Attack
Fields.Description: Absolute flick attack power of attack.

Fields.Name: Guard: Guard Flick
Fields.Description:
Absolute guard flick power of guard.
NPC only.

Fields.Name: Damage: Poise
Fields.Description: Absolute poise attack power of attack.

Fields.Name: Damage: Throw Escape
Fields.Description: Absolute attack power of attack during throw.

Fields.Name: Damage: Object
Fields.Description: Amount of damage dealt to objects by this attack.

Fields.Name: Guard Correction: Stability
Fields.Description: Percentage multiplier applied to stability of guard.

Fields.Name: Guard Correction: Absorption
Fields.Description: Percentage multiplier applied to damage absorptions of guard.

Fields.Name: Throw Type ID
Fields.Description: Throw to trigger when attack hits. For some reason, throws are triggered using this ID, which is a field within each Throw table entry rather than the ID of the Throw table entry itself.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Hit Type
Fields.Description: Type of hit applied by hitbox.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Hit Type
Fields.Description: Type of hit applied by hitbox.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Hit Type
Fields.Description: Type of hit applied by hitbox.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Hit Type
Fields.Description: Type of hit applied by hitbox.

Fields.Name: Hit 0: Priority
Fields.Description: Priority of hitbox. If two hits occur simultaneously, only the highest priority hit occurs.

Fields.Name: Hit 1: Priority
Fields.Description: Priority of hitbox. If two hits occur simultaneously, only the highest priority hit occurs.

Fields.Name: Hit 2: Priority
Fields.Description: Priority of hitbox. If two hits occur simultaneously, only the highest priority hit occurs.

Fields.Name: Hit 3: Priority
Fields.Description: Priority of hitbox. If two hits occur simultaneously, only the highest priority hit occurs.

Fields.Name: Damage Level
Fields.Description:
Impact level of attack, which determines how the target reacts to it (e.g. knocked backward, launched into the air, etc.).
Certain special effects on the target (e.g. Iron Flesh) may re-map this impact level to a different one.

Fields.Name: Map Hit Type
Fields.Description: Determines how this attack interacts with the map.

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption Bypass Rate
Fields.Description:
Percentage of target's current guard rate to bypass.
Guard bypass starts at 255 for 1 percent bypass to 156 for 100 percent bypass.
(Needs testing) Values of 1 to 100 will increase guarding effectiveness.

Fields.Name: Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Type of physical damage done by attack.

Fields.Name: Special Attribute
Fields.Description: Type of elemental damage done by attack.

Fields.Name: Attack Type
Fields.Description: Determines the sounds and visual effects generated by the attack itself (before hit).

Fields.Name: Attack Material
Fields.Description: Determines the sounds and visual effects generated when the attack hits. A value of 255 uses the weapon default.

Fields.Name: Attack SE/FX Size
Fields.Description: Size of sounds and visual effects.

Fields.Name: Defence SE Material
Fields.Description: Determines the sound effects used when guarding. Usually 255 for Player Attacks and 0 (if not a block) or 50 (if blocking) for Non-Player Attacks.

Fields.Name: Defence FX Material
Fields.Description: Determines the visual effects used when guarding. Usually 255 for Player Attacks and 0 (if not a block) or 50 (if blocking) for Non-Player Attacks.

Fields.Name: Hit Source Type
Fields.Description: Specify where you get the model point for attack. Set to 1 for parries, ripostes, and basic body attacks (falling, rolling, etc.), and zero otherwise. Use that pattern.

Fields.Name: Throw Flag
Fields.Description: Determines how this attack relates to throws: not at all, a throw trigger, or a throw damage parameter.

Fields.Name: Disable Guard
Fields.Description: If True, this attack cannot be blocked (e.g. throws).

Fields.Name: Disable Stamina Attack
Fields.Description: If True, this attack will deal no stamina damage, regardless of its stamina attack power.

Fields.Name: Disable Hit SpEffect
Fields.Description: If True, this attack will trigger no special effects on the target.

Fields.Name: Disable Missed Attack Notification For AI
Fields.Description: If True, the character's AI will not be informed when this attack misses. Enabled for basic body attacks (falling, rolling, ladder punches, etc.) that are generally not considered to be serious attacks.

Fields.Name: Repeat Hit Sound FX
Fields.Description: If True, sound effects will supposedly be repeated as long as the attack continuously hits a wall.

Fields.Name: Is Arrow Attack: Can Headshot
Fields.Description: Flags if this attack can land headshots. Frequently flagged for physical projectiles (knives/arrows/bolts).

Fields.Name: Is Attack By Ghost
Fields.Description: Flags if this is an attack of a ghost, which presumably disables wall collision, etc.

Fields.Name: Ignore Invincibility Frames
Fields.Description: If True, this attack will ignore invincibility frames from rolling or backstepping (but not other sources of invincibility such as TAE or events).

Fields.Name: Oppose Target
Fields.Description: Attack can hit enemy targets

Fields.Name: Friendly Target
Fields.Description: Attack can hit friendly targets

Fields.Name: Self Target
Fields.Description: Attack can hit self

Fields.Name: Same Attack Judgment ID
Fields.Description: Same attack judgment ID

Fields.Name: Decal ID [1]
Fields.Description: Decal ID 1 (directly specified)

Fields.Name: Decal ID [2]
Fields.Description: Decal ID 2 (directly specified)

Fields.Name: Appear AI Sound ID
Fields.Description: ID of AI sound generated when an attack occurs

Fields.Name: Hit AI Sound ID
Fields.Description: ID of AI sound generated at the time of hit

Fields.Name: Rally HP Correction
Fields.Description: Weapon regain amount correction value

Fields.Name: Rally HP Gain
Fields.Description: Weapon regain amount

Fields.Name: Rally Duration
Fields.Description: Regain possible time correction magnification

Fields.Name: Rally Duration Correction
Fields.Description: Regain possibility correction magnification
